languages.text: {n}Погруженный в работу Эоганн замирает на мгновение, прислушиваясь к Нунциусу, бросает взгляд на {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитаторы{/g} и качает головой.{/n} "Нет, дражайший коллега, слишком много".

traits.locale_text: {n}Погруженный в работу Эо-ганн замирает на мгновение, прислушиваясь к Нунциусу, бросает взгляд на {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитаторы{/g} и качает головой.{/n} "Нет, дражайший коллега, слишком много".

languages.text: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."
languages.original_text: {n}Погруженный в работу Эоганн замирает на мгновение, прислушиваясь к Нунциусу, бросает взгляд на {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитаторы{/g} и качает головой.{/n} "Нет, дражайший коллега, слишком много".

traits.locale_text: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the cogitators, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."
{n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the cogitators, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."
{n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the cogitators, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."

languages.text: {n}仕事に没頭するエオガンは、ヌンシウスの話を聞きながら、{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}思考器{/g}をちらりと見ながら、首を横に振る。{/n}「いいえ、最愛の同僚、それはやりすぎですよ」
languages.original_text: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."

traits.locale_text: 仕事に没頭するエオグンは、ヌンシウスの話を聞きながら、思考器をちらりと見ながら、首を横に振る。「いいえ、最愛の同僚、それはやりすぎですよ。」
{n}仕事に没頭するエオガンは、ヌンシウスの話を聞きながら、{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}思考器{/g}をちらりと見ながら、首を横に振る。{/n}「いいえ、最愛の同僚、それはやりすぎですよ」

languages.text: {n}正全神贯注于手头工作的伊奥贡停顿了片刻，侧耳倾听努恩修斯的话语，随后看了一眼{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}，摇了摇头。{/n}“不，我最亲爱的同僚，那样就太过火了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."

traits.locale_text: {n}正全神贯注于手头工作的伊奥贡停顿了片刻，侧耳倾听努恩修斯的话语，随后看了一眼{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}，摇了摇头。{/n}“不，我最亲爱的同僚，那样就太过火了。”

languages.text: {n}Absorto en su trabajo, Eogunn se detiene por un momento para escuchar a Nuncius, y después lanza una mirada a los {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitadores{/g} y niega con la cabeza.{/n} «No, mi buen colega, eso sería excesivo».
languages.original_text: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."

traits.locale_text: {n}Absorto en su trabajo, Eogunn se detiene por un momento para escuchar a Nuncius, y después lanza una mirada a los {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitadores{/g} y niega con la cabeza.{/n} «No, mi buen colega, eso sería excesivo».

languages.text: {n}Der in seine Arbeit vertiefte Eogunn hält einen Moment inne und hört Nuncius zu, ehe er einen Blick auf die {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitatoren{/g} wirft und den Kopf schüttelt.{/n} "Nein, geschätzter Kollege, das wäre exzessiv."
languages.original_text: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der in seine Arbeit vertiefte Eogunn hält einen Moment inne und hört Nuncius zu, ehe er einen Blick auf die {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitatoren{/g} wirft und den Kopf schüttelt.{/n} "Nein, geschätzter Kollege, das wäre exzessiv."

languages.text: {n}Absorbé par son travail, Eogunn s'interrompt un instant pour écouter ce que lui dit Nuncius, puis jette un coup d'œil aux {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateurs{/g} et secoue la tête.{/n} « Non, mon cher collègue, ce serait excessif. »
languages.original_text: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."

traits.locale_text: {n}Absorbé par son travail, Eogunn s'interrompt un instant pour écouter ce que lui dit Nuncius, puis jette un coup d'œil aux {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateurs{/g} et secoue la tête.{/n} « Non, mon cher collègue, ce serait excessif. »

languages.text: {n}İşine dalmış olan Eogunn bir an duraksıyor, Nuncius'u dinleyip ardından {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayarlara{/g} bakıyor ve başını sallıyor.{/n} "Hayır pek değerli mesteklaşım, aşırıya kaçmak olur bu."
languages.original_text: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."

traits.locale_text: {n}İşine dalmış olan Eogunn bir an duraksıyor, Nuncius'u dinleyip ardından {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayarlara{/g} bakıyor ve başını sallıyor.{/n} "Hayır pek değerli mesteklaşım, aşırıya kaçmak olur bu."
